name: @capyup/pi-basic-tools
description: Standalone core productivity tools for pi: repo_map, read_block, symbol_outline, apply_patch, exec_command, write_stdin, grouped basic-tool UI, ask_user, ask_question, ask_questionnaire, fetch, Sourcegraph, and built-in search activation. (todo split out into @tintinweb/pi-tasks.)
author: capyup

scripts.test:build: bun build extensions/index.ts extensions/fetch.ts extensions/enable-builtin-search.ts extensions/repo-map.ts extensions/read-block.ts extensions/symbol-outline.ts extensions/apply-patch.ts extensions/terminal-session.ts extensions/ask-user.ts extensions/ask-question.ts extensions/ask-questionnaire.ts extensions/sourcegraph.ts --target=node --external @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent --external @earendil-works/pi-ai --external @earendil-works/pi-tui --external @sinclair/typebox --outdir /tmp/pi-basic-tools-build
scripts.test:tui-capture: python3 scripts/capture-pi-tui.py --expect TOOLS --expect symbol_outline --expect read_block --expect grep --expect-tools-block symbol_outline --expect-tools-block read_block --expect-tools-block grep --forbid 'grep grep'
scripts.test:tui-capture:current: python3 scripts/capture-pi-tui.py --current-pi-settings --expect TOOLS --expect symbol_outline --expect read_block --expect grep --expect-tools-block symbol_outline --expect-tools-block read_block --expect-tools-block grep --forbid 'grep grep'
